body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `NCDatasets` package from `0.12` to `0.12, 0.13`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for NCDatasets to 0.13, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Oceananigans` package from `0.81` to `0.81, 0.89`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Oceananigans to 0.89, (keep existing compat)
